intro: Barosma betulina cream, also known as Buchu cream, is a topical remedy derived from the roots of the Buchu plant. Native to South Africa, this plant has been used for centuries to treat various skin conditions, including acne, eczema, and minor wounds. The cream is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a popular natural remedy for soothing and protecting the skin.

recipe: To make barosma betulina cream for medicinal use, first, you need to obtain the root of the barosma betulina plant and dry it properly to preserve its medicinal properties.
